title: Eton Mess Trifle
description: A classic British dessert made with strawberries, cream, and meringue. Eton mess is a traditional English dessert made with strawberries, cream, and meringue that's been crushed and mixed together to create a delicious and effortless dessert.
instructions: In a large bowl, whip the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
In a separate bowl, mix together the sliced strawberries and confectioners' sugar.
Fold the whipped cream into the strawberry mixture until well combined.
Fold in the crushed meringue until well combined.
Spoon the mixture into individual serving dishes or a large serving dish.
Drizzle with lemon juice and serve immediately.
